description: Composition Black kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, mock fabric buttoned chest placket, three-quarter sleeves with lace detailing along the cuffs, and applique work above the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurta from aneri. The fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the applique work in contrast colour above the hem heightens the fashion statement of this kurta. Team it with leggings or patialas and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
